name: F3 Uranium Corp.
description: F3 Uranium Corp. is a Canadian uranium project generator and exploration company focused on the Athabasca Basin in Saskatchewan, Canada. The company is led by an experienced, award-winning management and technical team with a track record of major uranium discoveries. F3 Uranium's flagship project is the PLN Project, where the high-grade JR Zone was discovered, and it holds a portfolio of other highly prospective uranium projects in the region.
